title: Letter Stories - Site Configuration
description: Main site configuration used across multiple components including layout, header, footer, SEO, and page components.

site.description: Site identity and branding settings. Used in: Logo.js, Header.js, Baseof.js, SeoMeta.js, Share.js, layout.js

title.description: Site title. Used in Baseof.js (page title tag), SeoMeta.js (meta title fallback)

base_url.description: Base URL of the site. Used in Share.js (share link construction), Baseof.js (canonical URL), SeoMeta.js (canonical URL)

favicon.description: Path to favicon image. Used in layout.js (favicon link tag)

logo.description: Path to logo image. Used in Logo.js, Header.js

logo_width.description: Width of logo image in pixels. Used in Logo.js

logo_height.description: Height of logo image in pixels. Used in Logo.js

logo_text.description: Text fallback when logo image cannot be displayed. Used in Logo.js

settings.description: Blog/listing settings. Used in: Post.js, posts/page/[slug]/page.js, posts/[single]/page.js

pagination.description: Number of posts per page for pagination. Used in posts/page/[slug]/page.js

summary_length.description: Character limit for post summaries/excerpts. Used in Post.js

blog_folder.description: Content folder name where blog posts are stored. Used in Post.js, posts/[single]/page.js, posts/page/[slug]/page.js

params.description: General site parameters. Used in: Contact.js, Footer.js

tag_manager_id.description: Google Tag Manager ID. Used in layout.js

contact_form_action.description: Form action URL for the contact form submission. Used in Contact.js

footer_content.description: Footer description/about text. Used in Footer.js

copyright.description: Copyright notice displayed in the footer. Used in Footer.js

contact_info.description: Contact information displayed in the footer. Used in: Footer.js

phone.description: Phone number displayed in footer. Used in Footer.js (displayed as contact info)

email.description: Email address displayed in footer. Used in Footer.js (displayed as contact info)

nav_button.description: Call-to-action button in the navigation header. Used in: Header.js

enable.description: Toggle to show/hide the navigation button. Used in Header.js (conditional render)

label.description: Button text label. Used in Header.js

link.description: Button destination URL. Used in Header.js

metadata.description: SEO meta information. Used in: SeoMeta.js, Baseof.js

meta_author.description: Author name for meta tags. Used in SeoMeta.js, Baseof.js

meta_image.description: OG image path for social sharing. Used in SeoMeta.js, Baseof.js

meta_description.description: Default meta description fallback. Used in SeoMeta.js, Baseof.js

call_to_action.description: Call-to-action section typically shown on landing/homepage. Used in: Cta.js

enable.description: Toggle to show/hide the CTA section. Used in Cta.js (conditional render)

title.description: CTA section heading. Used in Cta.js

content.description: CTA section body text. Used in Cta.js

button.description: CTA button configuration. Used in Cta.js

disqus.description: Disqus comments configuration. Used in: DisqussEmbed.js

enable.description: Toggle to enable/disable Disqus comments. Used in DisqussEmbed.js (conditional render)

shortname.description: Disqus forum shortname. Used in DisqussEmbed.js

settings.description: Additional Disqus configuration settings. Used in DisqussEmbed.js (passed to DiscussionEmbed)
